en_title: Marvel's Spider-Man 2 Is Adding New Suit from Brand New Day for Free
cn_title: 《漫威蜘蛛侠2》迎来免费更新，加入新电影战衣
subtitle: 千载难逢的免费午餐
opus_summary: 《漫威蜘蛛侠2》将迎来数年来的首次内容更新，玩家可免费获得电影《崭新的一天》中蜘蛛侠的全新战衣。该战衣是三名蜘蛛侠战衣融合后的修订版。

paragraphs.en: Marvel's Spider-Man 2 is adding content for the first time in years, and it's completely free.
paragraphs.cn: 《漫威蜘蛛侠2》即将迎来数年来首个新增内容，而且完全免费。

paragraphs.en: Insomniac Games confirmed that Marvel's Spider-Man 2 players will get free access to the new suit from Brand New Day starting July 28th. The suit seems to be a revised version of the one from No Way Home, which is an amalgamation of the suits worn by Tobey Maguire, Andrew Garfield, and Tom Holland. During the film's development, Tom Holland noted that he sought feedback from fans online to try to make Brand New Day as good as it could be. That feedback led to revisions to the suit, which will also be reflected in the new update to Marvel's Spider-Man 2.
paragraphs.cn: Insomniac Games确认，《漫威蜘蛛侠2》玩家将可以在7月28日免费获得来自电影《崭新的一天》的全新战衣。这件战衣似乎是《英雄无归》中那套融合战衣的修订版，后者汇集了托比·马奎尔、安德鲁·加菲尔德和汤姆·霍兰德所穿战衣的特点。在电影开发过程中，汤姆·霍兰德曾提到他向粉丝征求了线上反馈，力求将《崭新的一天》打造得尽可能出色。这些反馈促成了对那件战衣的修改，而相关改动也将在本次《漫威蜘蛛侠2》更新中得到体现。

paragraphs.en: A new trailer for Brand New Day was released today alongside ticket pre-sales, and it looks like another thrilling adventure for the web-head. As of right now, there are still a lot of questions about the film. We still have yet to get a clear answer on who Sadie Sink is playing, but the leading theory is that she is playing Jean Grey . The actress has been with the cast on the film's press tour, but so far she hasn't contributed much to the conversation due to the secretive nature of her character.
paragraphs.cn: 今天，电影《崭新的一天》放出了全新预告片并同步开启预售，看起来这位小蜘蛛又将经历一场惊心动魄的冒险。目前，围绕这部电影仍有诸多疑问。我们至今尚不清楚Sadie Sink究竟饰演谁，但主流推测是她将出演琴·葛蕾。这位女演员一直随剧组参加影片的宣传巡演，不过由于她的角色高度保密，至今她也未曾在交流中透露多少信息。

paragraphs.en: As for Insomniac's Spider-Man, he's been MIA since 2023, and that will likely remain the case for the foreseeable future. Insomniac Games has already confirmed that Spidey will not appear in Marvel's Wolverine later this year, but it's expected that the studio may already be working on another Spider-Man game as we speak. It will likely be another year or two before the game materializes. Perhaps we'll get it as a launch title for PS6, like the Miles Morales game.
paragraphs.cn: 至于Insomniac自家的蜘蛛侠，自2023年之后便一直杳无音信，这种状态在可见的将来很可能还会延续。Insomniac Games此前已确认，小蜘蛛不会在年内发售的《漫威金刚狼》中登场，不过外界预期该工作室此刻或许已在着手开发又一款蜘蛛侠游戏。要等到这款游戏面世，很可能还得再花上一两年。说不定它会像《迈尔斯·莫拉莱斯》那样，成为PS6的首发护航作品。

paragraphs.en: It's unclear if Insomniac Games has any more plans to update Marvel's Spider-Man 2. The game famously had no DLC , unlike its predecessor. There's a chance that the release of Spider-Man: Beyond the Spider-Verse next summer could add more suits to the game, but we'll just have to wait and see.
paragraphs.cn: 目前尚不清楚Insomniac Games是否还有更多更新《漫威蜘蛛侠2》的计划。与前作不同，这款游戏众所周知没有推出过任何DLC。明年夏天《蜘蛛侠：超越蜘蛛宇宙》上映之际，也许会为游戏再添几套新战衣，但也只能静观其变了。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人，负责报道游戏、影视等各类娱乐内容。你可以在Twitter上关注他 @Cade_Onder。

pending_dict.reason: 暂无官方中文片名，依据漫画同名故事线及语境暂译
